channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped garden waste, 21st July
item.description:
Garden waste has been dumped here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salisbury Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet another Flytip- Hazelbourne Road, 21st July
item.description:
Wooden door dumped near junction with Balham hill. Needs to be removed urgently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Balham Hill, Balham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged guttering, 21st July
item.description:
Truck damage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Road, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car for sale, VW Silver, FV05 YEG, 21st July
item.description:
Car for sale on public road, I know I keep complaining, but every now and again, someone uses this space for stacking their cars for sale at this spot and leaving them indefinitely, there is a Blue VW saloon, reg WF54 WRK, opposite that has been parked up for weeks now as well, which I think is part of the cars sales / car pool.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Augustine Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big metal bbq and green see saw play equipment left outside our flat, 21st July
item.description:
This large rubbish has been left in the street outside our flat and is obstructing the pavement and access to our bins and gas cupboards

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spurstowe Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chopped down tree / unfinished works, 21st July
item.description:
Tree has been chopped but not removed or replaced

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmcroft Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builder waste left on path, 21st July
item.description:
Builders waste bag left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkfield Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking path, 21st July
item.description:
Tree blocking path Tree on opposite corner also needs a trim
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Almond Way, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Street light - lantern twisted, 21st July
item.description:
174F 14 Column ok Lantern is twisted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faringdon Avenue, Locksbottom, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bed base, 21st July
item.description:
An abandoned bed has been on the footpath outside 27 Jerningham Road for some time now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jerningham Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep clean of path and scrap back of dirt, 21st July
item.description:
Dirt and weeds are encroaching on the whole path. Mud needs scrapping back. Large build up of leaves towards the church.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A21, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple tags, 21st July
item.description:
On 2x utility boxes and speed limit signs. Opposite 32T 28
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turpington Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty path brambles and dead bushes encroaching on path, 21st July
item.description:
Large nettles need cutting back and weeds dead leaves scraping back on the path.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A21, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Width barriers missing, 21st July
item.description:
The width barriers were removed due to the flooding in crayford high street. That has been fixed so the bollards need to be returned. It’s a danger due to cars speeding and HGVS driving in excess of 20mph
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in numerals on tarmac, 21st July
item.description:
Someone has sprayed the number 32 on the tarmac in bright yellow large rough lettering on the public tarmac outside no 32 ravenscroft crescent se9 4ll this is extremely unsightly i have spoken to most of the local residents and they all agree it needs removing it has been there 2 months at least

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Crescent, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seymour Villas road is not being cleaned, 21st July
item.description:
The road has not been cleaned since my last report. The glass debris is still there, the same detritus between the road and pavement have not been removed. Bromley council must make sure that the minimal service is provided and our road in Anerley, Penge and Crystal Palace areas are as clean as of Bromley and Beckenham. Please come and check for real.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of sofa dumped in Bournewood Road, 21st July
item.description:
Just in front of Bournewood Road sign just after Gilroy Way thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bournewood Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches still overhanging public footpath, 21st July
item.description:
Previously reported a few months ago and no action taken - branches now hanging so low down over the pavement so only 3ft clearance for pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at junction of Hill View Drive and Shepherds Lane, 21st July
item.description:
See summary

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hill View Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter picking neeeded at play area and sports court, 21st July
item.description:
Litter picking needed on children’s playground and inside and around sports court. There are no physical bins at the playground, which is probably why the littering gets so bad so quick. This playground should be maintained just like every other area. On your site it says that little picking and road cleaning is done every two days but I haven’t had to make another request since it was been cleaned last 2 weeks ago. Please can you look into getting multiple bins for this area and also litter picking regularly please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-30, Dartford Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
